# BizGrants Consulting

> Singapore CCP, Job Redesign Grant, and SkillsFuture grant advisory for SME and corporate employers. Founded 2023. Legal name BizGrants Consulting Pte. Ltd. Success-fee model, employers pay only when grants are approved. Office at 60 Paya Lebar Road, #06-28, Paya Lebar Square, Singapore 409051.

## Glossary

- **CCP**, Career Conversion Programme: Workforce Singapore funding that supports employers to hire or reskill mid-career workers (Singapore Citizens and PRs) into new or redesigned roles, with structured on-the-job training (OJT).
- **WSG**, Workforce Singapore: the statutory board administering CCP, Job Redesign Grants, and related employment-support schemes.
- **JRG**, Job Redesign Grant: funding to redesign existing roles for productivity, transformation, or technology adoption.
- **SkillsFuture**, Singapore's national upskilling movement; SkillsFuture-supported funding underpins many CCPs and reskilling initiatives.
- **OJT**, On-the-Job Training: structured, supervised training delivered as part of an employee's day-to-day work, central to every CCP application.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://bizgrants.consulting/): Overview of the firm and headline funding scenarios
- [Services](https://bizgrants.consulting/services/): CCP and Job Redesign Grant advisory services
- [About BizGrants Consulting](https://bizgrants.consulting/about/): Firm profile, advisory principles, and engagement model
- [Case Studies](https://bizgrants.consulting/case-studies/): Fifteen anonymized CCP engagements across travel media, medtech, F&B, built environment, fund management, biotech, fintech, hospitality, SaaS, AI consulting, cleantech, industrial manufacturing, digital media, beauty, and real estate
- [Pathways](https://bizgrants.consulting/pathways/): All CCP pathways with eligibility, salary minimums, and supported job families
- [Contact](https://bizgrants.consulting/contact/): Free consultation, NAP details

## Case studies

- [Travel media workforce build-out](https://bizgrants.consulting/case-studies/travel-media-workforce-buildout/): Six concurrent role tracks for a content-to-commerce SME transition
- [Medtech Job Redesign + new-hire conversion](https://bizgrants.consulting/case-studies/medtech-job-redesign-reskilling/): GMP and AI/GenAI competency build at a regulated medical device manufacturer
- [F&B parallel conversions](https://bizgrants.consulting/case-studies/fnb-people-operations-conversion/): People & Culture and Operations leadership conversions in the same cohort window
- [Built environment Innovation Lead](https://bizgrants.consulting/case-studies/built-environment-innovation-lead/): Sector-pathway career conversion at an M&E services contractor
- [Fund management finance cohort](https://bizgrants.consulting/case-studies/fund-management-finance-cohort/): Master OJT blueprint for CFO, Fund Accountant, and Investment Professional roles
- [Single-cell biotech twin reskilling](https://bizgrants.consulting/case-studies/biotech-commercial-reskilling/): Two scientists reskilled into hybrid commercial-and-applications leads
- [Fintech AI payments cohort](https://bizgrants.consulting/case-studies/fintech-ai-payments-cohort/): Five-role coordinated cohort during a strategic pivot to enterprise AI payments
- [Hospitality multi-property cohort](https://bizgrants.consulting/case-studies/hospitality-multi-property/): Five corporate-office roles with shared sustainability and governance modules
- [SaaS mobile app rolling cohorts](https://bizgrants.consulting/case-studies/saas-mobile-app-cohorts/): Four staggered CCP cohorts over 18 months across product, engineering, and digital marketing
- [Data analytics AI reskilling](https://bizgrants.consulting/case-studies/data-ai-consultancy-reskilling/): Senior consultant reskilled into AI-aligned delivery lead with TSC-mapped OJT
- [Cleantech water purification commercial conversion](https://bizgrants.consulting/case-studies/cleantech-water-purification/): First senior commercial hire outside a founder-led sales motion at a deeptech SME
- [Industrial climate solutions twin engineering](https://bizgrants.consulting/case-studies/industrial-climate-engineers/): Two engineers reskilled for multi-vertical applications scope across regulated environments
- [Digital media phased cohort](https://bizgrants.consulting/case-studies/digital-media-phased-cohort/): Six staggered hires submitted in monthly tranches across editorial, sales, and operations
- [Beauty and aesthetics regional reskilling](https://bizgrants.consulting/case-studies/beauty-aesthetics-reskilling/): Marketing executive reskilled into digital-marketing-and-analytics specialist with launch-anchored OJT
- [Property services twin senior conversion](https://bizgrants.consulting/case-studies/real-estate-services-twin/): Parallel senior strategic and operations conversions at a scaling property services SME

## Pillar guides

- [WSG Career Conversion Programme](https://bizgrants.consulting/wsg-career-conversion-programme/): Definitive employer guide to the WSG CCP
- [CCP for Employers](https://bizgrants.consulting/ccp-for-employers/): Step-by-step employer journey from eligibility to claims
- [CCP Grant Funding](https://bizgrants.consulting/ccp-grant-singapore/): How CCP funding works, caps, supported items, evidence
- [Career Conversion Programmes overview](https://bizgrants.consulting/career-conversion-programmes/): Plain-English orientation for HR and business owners
- [CCP for Digital Marketing roles](https://bizgrants.consulting/ccp-digital-marketing/): Role design and OJT examples for digital roles
- [CCP for Sustainability roles](https://bizgrants.consulting/ccp-sustainability/): Role design and OJT examples for sustainability/ESG roles

## Blog articles

- [CCP Eligibility](https://bizgrants.consulting/blog/ccp-eligibility/): Who qualifies for the Career Conversion Programme
- [CCP Application Guide](https://bizgrants.consulting/blog/ccp-application-guide/): Step-by-step CCP application process
- [CCP Application Pitfalls](https://bizgrants.consulting/blog/ccp-application-pitfalls/): Common CCP mistakes to avoid
- [CCP vs JGI vs SFEC](https://bizgrants.consulting/blog/ccp-vs-jgi-sfec/): Comparing CCP, Jobs Growth Incentive, and SFEC for employers
- [CCP Reskilling Examples](https://bizgrants.consulting/blog/ccp-reskilling-examples/): Real Singapore reskilling use cases
- [CCP Flat-fee vs Success-fee Consulting](https://bizgrants.consulting/blog/ccp-flatfee-consulting/): Why success-fee beats flat-fee for grant advisory
- [CCP Hiring Grants](https://bizgrants.consulting/blog/ccp-hiring-grants/): GRIT vs MCPP vs CCP, which programme fits SME hiring
- [SkillsFuture Enterprise Credit Guide](https://bizgrants.consulting/blog/skillsfuture-enterprise-credit/): How the S$10,000 SFEC credit works for Singapore SMEs, eligibility, qualifying activities, and how to claim
- [Productivity Solutions Grant Guide](https://bizgrants.consulting/blog/productivity-solutions-grant/): How PSG works for Singapore SMEs, IMDA pre-approved vendors, supported solution categories, and Business Grants Portal application flow
- [Enterprise Development Grant Application Guide](https://bizgrants.consulting/blog/enterprise-development-grant/): How EDG works for Singapore SMEs across the three pillars (Core Capabilities, Innovation, Market Access), funding caps, and project scoping
